description: The Basij Resistance Force (Niroo-ye Moqavemat-e Basij) is a paramilitary volunteer militia subordinate to the [Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps). Founded by [Ruhollah Khomeini](/people/ruhollah-khomeini) in 1979, it played a prominent role in the [Iran-Iraq War](/events/iran-iraq-war) through human-wave assaults. It functions as an internal security and social control force, operating through mosques, universities, and government offices. It was centrally involved in the violent suppression of the [Green Movement](/events/green-movement-protests-2009) in 2009 and the Mahsa Amini protests in 2022.
editorial_notes: Subordinate to IRGC. Estimated millions of members on paper.
